_comment: Copy to services.policy.json for richer/templated services that don't fit the one-line auth-hosts model (multi-secret basic auth, fixed paths, etc.). Each becomes a named broker tool: `broker call <name> '{...args}'`. ${VAULT:KEY} substitutes a vault secret; ${ARG:name} substitutes a tool argument. Secrets are substituted host-side only, never logged or returned.

github.description: Authenticated GitHub API call. Provide method + path (+ optional JSON body). Example path: repos/OWNER/REPO/commits?per_page=5

example_dual_secret_basic.description: Pattern: an API whose Basic auth uses TWO secrets (key:secret), e.g. some commerce APIs.

example_query_auth.description: Pattern: an API that authenticates with a ?api_key= query param (host adds it).
